etymology.description: дәј(дәј) (jГӯ, "gather") + еҶҠ(еҶҠ) (cГЁ, "book") = gathering of books -> order
etymology.interpretation: The character дҫ–(дҫ–) (lГәn, "phonetic") combines the idea of gathering дәј(дәј) (jГӯ, "gather") with еҶҠ(еҶҠ) (cГЁ, "book") to suggest an organized collection or order, implying systematic arrangement or sequence, akin to ordering books.
